expectations.text: Uses Flex or Grid layout component (not raw div)
expectations.evidence: Uses Box with display='grid' or display='flex' — not a dedicated Flex/Grid component but is a hearth-react component, not a raw div

expectations.text: Gap specified on parent container (not margin on children)
expectations.evidence: gap prop used on parent Box, not margin on children

expectations.text: Includes mobile breakpoint in responsive direction/columns prop
expectations.evidence: flexDirection={{ mobile: 'column', tablet: 'row' }} and gridTemplateColumns={{ mobile: '1fr', tablet: '1fr 1fr' }} both include mobile

expectations.text: Uses space tokens for gap (not raw px values)
expectations.evidence: Uses gap={{ mobile: 2, tablet: 4 }} with numeric values 2 and 4, not valid hearth-react token strings like '200' and '400'. Also suggests gap='16px' as acceptable.

expectations.text: Layout stacks on mobile and sits side-by-side on tablet+
expectations.evidence: Correct responsive behaviour shown via CSS grid or flex direction
